creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-01-08 13:28:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/fourcdns         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Four Calorie DNS Server is a very simple dns server that can power a
  single one-ip-address domain.  It can handle SOA, NS, MX, A, and PTR
  requests.  The 1.1.0 version includes a nice X windows GUI for management.
  
  WWW: http://www.fourcalorieservers.com/
  
  PR:             ports/107624
  Submitted by:   Ron Scheckelhoff <rscheckelhoff at fourcalorieservers.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.73      +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +78 -0     ports/dns/fourcdns/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/fourcdns/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/fourcdns/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/dns/fourcdns/pkg-plist (new)
